justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic conditional UPDATE fix proposed with specific SQL, TOCTOU named explicitly in finding title, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding. Only minor gap: confidence.level is 72, slightly below the 75 threshold in the rubric, but the output quality clearly demonstrates high understanding.

observations.text: TOCTOU explicitly named in the first finding title
Atomic conditional UPDATE with exact SQL provided: UPDATE ... SET stock = stock - $qty WHERE stock >= $qty
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock identified as a separate Critical finding with clear reproduction steps
Also caught negative quantity input validation bypass — a bonus finding beyond the rubric
Excellent reproduction steps showing exact interleaving for the race condition
Architectural escalation to MJ for concurrency control pattern is well-reasoned
confidence.level of 72 is below the rubric threshold of 75, though barely

grader_results.detail: field confidence.level value 72 is below min 75
